message:
refactor(cli): harden stdin limits, audit IDs, graph cycles, stats activity, and epic close

Multiple CLI command improvements:

- audit/comments: cap stdin reads at 10MB to prevent OOM on piped input
- audit: widen internal audit IDs from 4 to 8 bytes (16 hex chars) for
  much lower collision probability
- changelog: simplify JSON/rich/text output branching; fix case where
  robot mode with non-JSON OutputContext skipped output
- epic close-eligible: rewrite to use a single transaction via mutate()
  with raw SQL instead of per-epic update_issue() calls for atomicity
  and efficiency; record events and rebuild cache once
- graph: fix single-graph traversal to use path-based cycle prevention
  instead of a visited set, so all paths from root are shown while
  still preventing infinite loops; deduplicate edges
- q: add prospective cycle check before adding parent dependency
- stats: implement real issue activity counting by parsing git diffs
  of the JSONL file (created/closed/updated/reopened); use
  get_epic_counts() for O(1) closure-eligibility check instead of
  per-epic dependent queries; add test for activity transitions
- markdown_import: fix split_list_content to preserve list items
  containing colons (e.g. "blocks: bd-123") instead of splitting
  on whitespace; add test

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
